mapper.select: SELECT * FROM health_risk_warning WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM health_risk_warning WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM health_risk_warning WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM health_risk_warning ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_risk_warning (user_id, warning_type, risk_level, warning_content, status, handle_status, handle_result) VALUES (#{userId}, #{warningType}, #{riskLevel}, #{warningContent}, #{status}, #{handleStatus}, #{handleResult})
mapper.update: UPDATE health_risk_warning SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE health_risk_warning SET handle_status = #{handleStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
